title: Check Smalls System Layout and Color-Coded Status on the Overview Screen
summary: Use the Smalls overview screen in the system HMI to inspect the displayed smalls system layout and observe the color-coded status shown for each part of the system.
when_to_use: Use this procedure when an operator needs to view the Smalls overview screen and observe the displayed smalls system layout and the color-coded status of each part of the system.
not_for: Do not use this procedure to assign undocumented meanings to specific colors.
Do not use this procedure for control actions, startup, shutdown, purge, or other system-changing operations not described in this source section.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Access the Smalls overview screen, observe the displayed system layout and color-coded statuses, compare the shown statuses across system parts, and record only what is displayed on the HMI.

safety_notes: This source supports observation of HMI information only.
Do not assign undocumented meanings to specific colors because this source section does not define them.

system_preconditions: The Smalls overview screen must be available from the SMALLS selection.

external_references.title: Smalls Overview Screen Shows System Layout

visual_references.description: Smalls System Overview Screen showing the smalls system layout and color-coded status of each part of the system.

steps.title: Open the Smalls overview screen
steps.purpose: Access the HMI screen used to view the smalls system layout and displayed status information.
steps.instruction: On the system HMI, press SMALLS to access the "Smalls" overview screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The HMI displays the "Smalls" overview screen.
steps.failure_condition: The overview screen is not accessible from SMALLS.

actions.label: Open Smalls overview
actions.exact_action: Press SMALLS to access the "Smalls" overview screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Smalls overview screen reached after pressing SMALLS.

stop_or_escalate_if: The overview screen is not accessible from SMALLS.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Smalls" overview screen shows the smalls system layout and a color-coded status of each part of the system.
Press SMALLS to access the "Smalls" overview screen.

steps.title: Observe the displayed smalls system layout
steps.purpose: Confirm that the screen is presenting the smalls system layout described by the source.
steps.instruction: Observe the overall smalls system layout shown on the Smalls overview screen.
steps.expected_result: The operator can see the smalls system layout on the screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The screen shows the smalls system layout.
steps.failure_condition: The screen does not show the expected system layout.

actions.label: View system layout
actions.exact_action: Observe the overall smalls system layout shown on the screen.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The overall smalls system layout displayed on the overview screen.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screen does not show the expected system layout.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Smalls" overview screen shows the smalls system layout and a color-coded status of each part of the system.
The "Smalls" overview screen shows the smalls system layout.

steps.title: Inspect the color-coded status shown for each part of the system
steps.purpose: Review the displayed status information for each represented part of the smalls system.
steps.instruction: Inspect each represented part of the system for its displayed color-coded status.
steps.expected_result: The operator can identify the displayed color-coded status for each part of the system.
steps.healthy_condition: Each represented part of the system displays a visible color-coded status on the screen.
steps.failure_condition: The screen does not display color-coded status for system parts.

actions.label: Inspect displayed statuses
actions.exact_action: Inspect each represented part of the system for its displayed color-coded status.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The color-coded status indications shown for each part of the smalls system.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screen does not display color-coded status for system parts.
A color indication is present but its meaning is not defined in this source section and interpretation beyond observation is required.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Smalls" overview screen shows the smalls system layout and a color-coded status of each part of the system.

steps.title: Compare the displayed statuses across the system
steps.purpose: Form an overall view of the currently shown state of the smalls system using only the displayed HMI information.
steps.instruction: Compare the displayed status indications across the parts of the system to identify the current shown state of the overall smalls system.
steps.expected_result: The operator can describe the currently shown overall state of the smalls system based on the displayed statuses.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed statuses can be reviewed across the visible system parts on the overview screen.
steps.failure_condition: The displayed statuses cannot be consistently reviewed across the visible system parts or the screen content is incomplete.

actions.label: Compare shown statuses
actions.exact_action: Compare the displayed status indications across the parts of the system to identify the current shown state of the overall smalls system.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The full overview screen so statuses across multiple system parts can be compared.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screen content is incomplete or does not allow comparison across the shown system parts.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Smalls" overview screen shows the smalls system layout and a color-coded status of each part of the system.

steps.title: Record the observed displayed statuses
steps.purpose: Capture what the HMI is showing without adding unsupported interpretation.
steps.instruction: Record the observed color-coded statuses using only the screen information provided by the HMI.
steps.expected_result: The observed displayed statuses are documented based only on what is shown on the screen.
steps.healthy_condition: Recorded observations match the visible HMI display and do not assign undocumented meanings to colors.
steps.failure_condition: The operator cannot record the displayed statuses because the screen is unavailable, incomplete, or requires unsupported interpretation.

actions.label: Record displayed statuses
actions.exact_action: Record the observed color-coded statuses using only the screen information provided by the HMI.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The displayed layout and color-coded statuses to be recorded exactly as shown.

stop_or_escalate_if: The screen is unavailable or incomplete.
Interpretation of color meaning beyond what is shown is required.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The "Smalls" overview screen shows the smalls system layout and a color-coded status of each part of the system.
The source does not define the meaning of individual colors, so the procedure is limited to observing and recording displayed status.

success_criteria: The Smalls overview screen is accessible from SMALLS.
The operator can view the smalls system layout on the overview screen.
The operator can identify the displayed color-coded status for each shown part of the system.
The observed displayed statuses are recorded using only information shown on the HMI.
healthy_conditions: The Smalls overview screen opens successfully.
The screen shows the smalls system layout.
The screen displays color-coded status for each part of the system.
Observed statuses can be compared across the displayed system parts.
failure_conditions: The overview screen is not accessible from SMALLS.
The screen does not show the expected system layout.
The screen does not display color-coded status for system parts.
The procedure would require assigning undocumented meanings to specific colors.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the overview screen is not accessible from SMALLS.
Escalate if the screen does not show the expected system layout or does not display color-coded status for system parts.
Escalate if interpretation of specific color meanings is required, because this source section does not define them.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Reference image of the Smalls overview screen showing the system layout and color-coded status of each part of the system.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: The "Smalls" overview screen shows the smalls system layout and a color-coded status of each part of the system.

missing_details: This source section does not define the meaning of individual colors shown on the Smalls overview screen.
This source section does not provide acceptance thresholds or decision criteria beyond observing displayed status.
This source section does not specify a required recording location or format for captured observations.
This source section does not provide an estimated completion time.
